description: CompositionBlack and grey quilted jacket made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with elasticated cuffs, mock neck, zippered closure on the front, insert pockets on either sides of the zipper with snap button closures, light down cluster filling for insulation and an elasticated hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry on lowThis quilted jacket from nike based on skiing staples is perfect for chilly weather. The grey and black panels give an added edge, while the classic down filling offers lightweight comfort and superior warmth. Team this with tees and jeans.
